Headache.advice: Drink water, rest in a dark room, and avoid screens.

Dizziness.advice: Sit or lie down immediately. Drink water and avoid sudden movements.

Blurred Vision.advice: Take breaks from screens and rest your eyes.

Chest Pain.advice: Seek immediate medical attention if persistent or severe.

Shortness of Breath.advice: Use prescribed inhaler or consult a doctor immediately.

Nausea.advice: Avoid solid food, drink ORS, and rest.

Abdominal Pain.advice: Avoid spicy foods, eat light meals, and drink warm water.

Diarrhea.advice: Stay hydrated with ORS and avoid oily foods.

Joint Pain.advice: Apply ice, rest, and take over-the-counter pain relievers if needed.

Swelling.advice: Apply a cold compress and keep the area elevated.

Stiffness.advice: Do gentle stretches and stay active.

Rash.advice: Apply moisturizer, avoid allergens, and keep skin clean.

Itching.advice: Use anti-itch lotion or hydrocortisone cream.

Red Spots.advice: Avoid scratching and consult a dermatologist if persistent.

Redness.advice: Use prescribed eye drops and avoid touching eyes.

Dry Eyes.advice: Use lubricating eye drops and reduce screen time.

Sore Throat.advice: Gargle with salt water and drink warm fluids.

Difficulty Swallowing.advice: Eat soft foods and consult a doctor if it worsens.

Voice Loss.advice: Rest your voice and stay hydrated.

Lower Back Pain.advice: Apply heat, rest, and avoid heavy lifting.

Upper Back Pain.advice: Maintain good posture and take breaks while sitting.

Stiff Back.condition: Poor Posture or Lack of Movement
Stiff Back.advice: Do back stretches and avoid slouching.

Fatigue.advice: Get 7-8 hours of sleep and eat iron-rich foods.

Fever.advice: Take paracetamol, rest, and drink plenty of fluids.

Loss of Appetite.advice: Eat light meals and stay hydrated.
